response.justification: Aisha Okonkwo demonstrates extensive experience as a senior full-stack engineer with over 10 years in the field, working across diverse industries and technologies. Her expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and databases aligns well with the primary stack, while her contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling show adaptability to emerging technologies. Her leadership in open-source projects and commitment to software craftsmanship further strengthen her candidacy.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven track record in scaling applications (handling millions of requests, real-time systems)
Demonstrated expertise in AI-agent development and modern tooling (MCP, Kubernetes)
concerns: Limited direct experience with Nest.js (primary stack requirement)
No explicit mention of Vitest testing framework in recent roles
Several roles involve non-primary stacks (Dlang, C++, Swift) which may indicate less focus on the required tech stack
